classes.reasoning: This is an Investigational Medicinal Product Accountability Log (eTMF-004), a regulated trial master file document tracking IMP receipt, dispensing, returns, and reconciliation at a clinical site. It does not fit any more specific class (not a protocol, consent, CRF, or report).

summary: This is an Investigational Medicinal Product Accountability Log (eTMF-004) for study BIORCE-ONC-2023-001 at site ES-02 (Hospital Universitario La Paz, Madrid). It records receipt, dispensing, and return of BRC-471 (Lumitanib) 100 mg tablets between April and November 2023, maintained by the site pharmacist Dra. Patricia Ruiz.
